name: tailwind-v4
description: Tailwind CSS v4 with the new CSS-first config (no tailwind.config.js needed). Adds globals.css with @import 'tailwindcss' and a postcss config. Pairs with next-15-app or any other framework.

verification.dev: node -e "import('@tailwindcss/postcss').then(() => console.log('tailwind v4 postcss plugin ok'))"
